title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha cannot believe their ears when Inspector Pandey declares the mission a success.

subTitle: Bhide grows uncomfortable after watching Tapu and his friends dance together. Tapu tries to convince him to join them.

subTitle: Anjali and Taarak ponder Popatlal's marital future. The kids in Gokuldham Society introduce a new game for Champaklal.

subTitle: Madhavi and Bhide argue about her cooking. The men of the Gokuldham Society gather at Abdul's soda shop.

subTitle: The society members celebrate when Jethalal overcomes his fear of electricity and turns on the lights of the flats in a bid to save Daya.

subTitle: As the women prepare for the ceremony and try to persuade their husbands to join, Taarak astounds them with a surprise.

subTitle: The women become angry upon realising their husbands' dishonesty and plot revenge. Daya recommends a clever approach to eradicate the rat from Taarak's kitchen.
